headline: Chief Product Officer, Navan
summary: Experienced product leader with a demonstrated history of working in Payments, Digital Advertising and FinTech industries. Skilled in creating data-driven growth initiatives, leading partnerships and setting innovation roadmaps. Bringing Product, Engineering, Design, Marketing, Content Strategy and Data Analysis to formulate a result-driven product vision. Deeply passionate about FinTech, talent development, Bring Your Human to Work, Agile, Machine Learning, AR and Blockchain
position_description_2: Focused on building the best Payment and Expense product at Navan. Nobody enjoys expense reports and it is our mission to develop AI tools that eliminate expense reports while giving companies full control and visibility over their spend

cs_subject: CBS '10 – what's missing in cash yield today?
cs_body: Yuval, reaching out as a fellow CBS alum. I'm advising a small, experienced team exploring what operators actually need from a yield product for idle cash.   Could I steal 15 minutes for your candid view? Happy to share anonymized patterns from others in the space. Greg
